changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Add composite indexes for common patient queries

changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Convert risk score JSON columns from TEXT to JSONB
changeSet.sql:
-- Convert factors to JSONB ALTER TABLE patient_risk_scores ALTER COLUMN factors TYPE jsonb USING CASE WHEN factors IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN factors = '' THEN NULL ELSE factors::jsonb END;
-- Convert comorbidities to JSONB ALTER TABLE patient_risk_scores ALTER COLUMN comorbidities TYPE jsonb USING CASE WHEN comorbidities IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN comorbidities = '' THEN NULL ELSE comorbidities::jsonb END;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE patient_risk_scores ALTER COLUMN factors TYPE text USING factors::text; ALTER TABLE patient_risk_scores ALTER COLUMN comorbidities TYPE text USING comorbidities::text;

changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Add GIN indexes on JSONB columns for complex queries
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_patient_risk_factors_gin ON patient_risk_scores USING GIN (factors); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_patient_risk_comorbidities_gin ON patient_risk_scores USING GIN (comorbidities);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_patient_risk_factors_gin; DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_patient_risk_comorbidities_gin;

changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.sql: UPDATE patient_risk_scores SET updated_at = created_at WHERE updated_at IS NULL;
